title: Seeking More Income? These Dividends Are Down but Could Rocket Higher in 2024.

title: Global dividends hit record $568 billion, but pace of U.S. payouts slows for sixth straight quarter
text: Global dividends rose 4.9% to a record $568 billion in the second quarter, but the pace of growth in the U.S. slowed for the sixth consecutive quarter after some high- profile technology and financial groups trimmed their payouts.

title: Blackstone invests in Manhattan's first film and TV production studio joint venture
text: The Blackstone Group (NYSE:BX) is teaming up with Hudson Pacific Properties and office giant Vornado Reality Trust on the construction of Manhattan's first film and television production studio at Pier 94.  The three companies are investing a combined $350 million in the joint venture, which is also a public-private partnership with New York's Economic Development Corporation.

title: Vornado, Hudson Pacific and Blackstone to build $350M TV and film production studio on Manhattan's Pier 94
text: Vornado Realty Trust VNO, +5.54%, Hudson Pacific Properties HPP, +5.19% and Blackstone Inc. BX, +1.22% said Tuesday they plan to spend $350 million to build a TV and film production studio on Manhattan's Pier 94 on the Hudson River at 52nd Street in a public-private partnership with New York City's economic development arm. The developers billed the project as Manhattan's first public-private partnership venture to build a purpose-built studio campus.

title: Vornado Realty Trust, Hudson Pacific, Blackstone, and New York City Economic Development Corporation to Create Public-Private Partnership and First Purpose-Built Studio Campus in Manhattan at Pier 94
text: NEW YORK & LOS ANGELES--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Vornado Realty Trust (NYSE: VNO), Hudson Pacific Properties (NYSE: HPP), Blackstone (NYSE: BX), the City of New York, and New York City Economic Development Corporation (NYCEDC) announced they have entered into Manhattan's first public-private partnership venture to build a purpose-built studio campus at Pier 94. Vornado, who contributed its long-term leasehold for Pier 94 to the venture, will own 49.9%; Hudson Pacific will own 25.6%; and Blacksto.

title: Blackstone: Time For A Rating Downgrade
text: Blackstone's recent results were solid but not strong, leading to a reduction in dividends. The company's shares have risen substantially, making them expensive. I am downgrading Blackstone from a "Buy" to a "Hold" due to the current valuation and lower dividend yield.

title: SEC Adopts Rules to Increase Transparency Among Private Funds
text: Per SEC's new rules to increase transparency, BX, CG, APO and KKR will have to issue quarterly fee and performance reports, and disclose fee structures.

title: Blackstone Announces Record Final Close for Fourth Flagship Tactical Opportunities Fund
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Blackstone (NYSE: BX) today announced that its Tactical Opportunities business closed its fourth flagship commingled fund, Blackstone Tactical Opportunities Fund IV (“BTO IV”), raising a record $5.2 billion of capital commitments. Including other single-investor vehicles pursuing the same strategy, the combined BTO IV platform is currently expected to have nearly $10 billion of new capital in its fourth fundraising vintage. title: My Dividend Stock Portfolio: New July Dividend Record - 99 Holdings With 26 Buys
